title: 铅笔画背景 3D 分身
description: Create a handrawn pencil illustration of [image] yawning on paper, as background. Add a 3D Pixar style render of [foto] standing casually infront of the giant handrawn pencil illustration. Soft cinematic lighting. 8K res
